title: Song: Our Family Weekend
objectives: Reinforce future simple (going to) through song
Practise family and weekend vocabulary in a musical context

key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: Together we're going to bake and play,
We're going to share this lovely day.
We're going to help and care, you see,
That's what makes a family!

Verse 2: We're going to walk, we're going to run,
We're going to shine under the sun.
Family love is always first.

Verse 3: We're going to laugh, we're going to play,
We're going to make the most today.
We're going to smile, Family time is joy.

teaching_notes: This song uses 'going to' in every line — perfect for reinforcing the grammar point. Activities mentioned: bake, play, share, help, care, walk, run, laugh, smile. Values: family bonding, helping, caring, gratitude. Good for actions/miming while singing.
